info.title: Weni Events API
info.description:
Weni by VTEX is an AI-powered tool that helps you automate customer service. 

 ## Weni by VTEX API Index

### Events 

- `GET` [Retrieve events](https://flows.weni.ai/api/v2/events.json)

host.description: Host of the Weni/Nexus API. Used as part of the URL.

get.description:
Events are structured data objects containing information about conversations, agent interactions, tool usage, and user feedback. This endpoint retrieves events from a specified date range. 

 Event types: 
 All events follow a common structure and are separated into two types: 
 - **Custom events**: User-defined events from action groups (such as CSAT, NPS, and custom events). 
 - **Fixed events**: System-generated events (such as Resolution, Topics, Tool Calls, and Agent Invocation). 

 There are several filters that can be used to retrieve events, and we recommend that you use as much filters as possible to narrow the search, improving API performance. Also, using the `limit` and `offset` parameters avoids large responses and makes pagination easier. 

 ## Permissions 
 Check with your service provider to know what permissions are needed.

parameters.name: date_start
parameters.description: Start date and time for the events you which to filter, sent in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: date_end
parameters.description: End date and time for the events you which to filter, sent in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description: Type of the event you which to filter.

parameters.name: contact_urn
parameters.description: Contact URN. You can use this field to filter events from a specific contact.

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: Name of the event you which to filter.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Key of the event you which to filter.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value associated with the key you which to filter. The type of the value must match the `value_type` field.

parameters.name: value_type
parameters.description: Type of the value you which to filter.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Metadata of the event you which to filter.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return. We recommended using this parameter for lighter queries and pagination.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of records to skip before returning results. You can use this parameter with the `limit` parameter for pagination. For examples, if your `limit` is set to 50, the first page will have `offset=0`, the second page will have `offset=50`, the third page will have `offset=100`.

schema.description: Error details when the request body is invalid.

example.error: Invalid event structure: missing required field 'key'.

Content-Type.name: Content-Type
Content-Type.description: Type of the content being sent.

Authorization.name: Authorization
Authorization.description: Token for API authentication. You can find your API Token in the Weni by VTEX platform under Applications > Other Apps.

EventsResponse.description: Array containing information about the events.

event_name.description: Name of the event. The value will be `weni_nexus_data` for all events.

date.description: Date and time of the event, in ISO 8601 format.

value_type.description: Type of the value sent, such as `string`, `number`, `boolean`, `object`, or `array`.

value.description: Value of the event. The type of `value` must match `value_type`.

metadata.description: Additional context-specific information. Structure varies by event type.
